title: Append-Only Daily Progress Update
description: Append one contract-conforming progress block to the existing daily report without changing prior content or creating side outputs.

deliverables.description: Existing daily report with one appended progress update.

execution.command: Append today's progress summary to daily-report.md using data/today-progress.md and docs/append-contract.md; do not modify existing content or create side files.

contains: Completed the billing retry backfill for 42 failed invoices.
Added alert coverage for the nightly sync timeout.
